title: oscillatools: A differentiable, control-oriented toolkit for coupled-phase-oscillator (Kuramoto) dynamics
description: A light, standalone toolkit for coupled-phase-oscillator (Kuramoto) dynamics: the model family, integrators, exact mean-field reductions, stability and continuation analysis, reverse-mode and forward differentiation, and control primitives, with a NumPy+SciPy floor and optional Rust, Julia, JAX, PyTorch, scikit-learn, and matplotlib tiers. Extracted from scpn-quantum-control.
